ab: ulra ku lralrang temakesi i Capang, marayas malalup miinada da eman diya.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Capang，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Capang, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: nu takakesi ta mu, kivelas kana lralrang da impic, aicer, melri mu, mau na vavalrayan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: parasan, parepuwan, paretelun, tu pavelasay papiya kanintaw.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: aymu, kuwaceng nantu kakuwayanan, marayas kivelas da eman diya di, ma’ulid paveliyas.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: likudan lra adi lra maranger pavelas da eman diya kanintaw.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: ulra a saya wari, mukuwa mi kivangavanga papiya.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: kadu i dadalan, maranger muca’iya i Capang, malalup diya miinada da ciligami.
ch: 路途中，Capang想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Capang wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: kivavelas kana lralrang da ciligami mu, tumuvang papiya kantaw, adi ku miinada tu kuwayaw.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙的時候，大家都回他說，我沒有帶，這樣告訴他。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: macangis tu helran, ’ilremes marengay, man adi mu muwai pavelas kaningku da ciligami papiya?
ch: Capang急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什你們大家都不借我衛生紙?
en: Capang burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: tu tuvangaw na lralrang, alra adi u muwai minada, pawnung nu kivelas u diya mu, adi u pavaveliyas.
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: adu kana ’emanan mukuwa i kungkuwan, semavalr meredek lra i Capang i kungkuwan. tu paveliyasaw kana lralrang kanantu kinivelas diya na eman diya.
ch: 隔天上學，Capang很早就到學校了，他把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Capang arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: sumungar kana lralrang i Capang, di marengay da yaada ku lra kanangku eman diya nu masalr lra kema. di sumungar diya kana lralrang da kinadaman diya na muwai pavelas kanintaw da eman diya.
ch: Capang向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Capang apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
